description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a modern, open layout and a flat roof. The exterior features a combination of wood paneling and large glass windows, providing a contemporary aesthetic. The property includes a spacious patio area with a swimming pool, surrounded by several trees and a small detached structure, likely a garage or shed. Outdoor furniture and a shaded seating area are visible, enhancing the recreational appeal of the space. The main entrance is accentuated by a covered porch, and the windows are arranged asymmetrically to maximize natural light. The overall design emphasizes outdoor living and seamless integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with wood paneling, large windows, a flat roof, and a poolside patio surrounded by trees and a detached garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and the detached garage to the left, with trees framing the property.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool, patio area, and outdoor seating, with the main building and garage visible in the background.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive patio, swimming pool, and the back facade with large windows and outdoor furniture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, patio, and the rear entrance, with trees and landscaping surrounding the bungalow.
